title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXXIII. Games.
content:
[Game with the hands.]

        Pease-pudding hot,
            Pease-pudding cold,
        Pease-pudding in the pot,
            Nine days old.
        Some like it hot,
            Some like it cold,
        Some like it in the pot,
            Nine days old.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXXIII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
